title: elattostachys zippeliana
intro: Elattostachys zippeliana, also known as the Zippeliana or the Philippine Mountain Cherry, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in the mountainous regions of the Philippines. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elattostachys zippeliana include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
